name: Kimco Realty Corporation Class M Depositary Shares each of which represents a one-one thousandth fractional interest in a share of 5.25% Class M Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock liquidation preference $25000.00 per share
summary: Kimco Realty Corporation's Class M Depositary Shares represent fractional interests in shares of the company's preferred stock. These depositary shares offer a fixed dividend rate and represent a claim on the company's assets in the event of liquidation. Kimco Realty Corporation is a REIT headquartered in Jericho, New York.
